topic: A skylight shows a sky that never matches the actual weather outside the house.
title: My Skylight Shows The Wrong Sky | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My skylight shows a clear night sky while rain hammers every other window in the house.
scenes.image_prompt: a ceiling skylight showing stars while rain streaks the walls below, dim room, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It sits above the stairwell, the only skylight in the place.
scenes.image_prompt: a square skylight set into a high ceiling above a dim stairwell, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: For years it matched the weather outside.
scenes.image_prompt: a skylight showing overcast gray daylight, plain ceiling, soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then one storm it stayed bright blue and calm.
scenes.image_prompt: a skylight glowing with calm blue daylight while the room below is dark and stormy, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went outside. Solid clouds. Pouring rain.
scenes.image_prompt: a person silhouette standing in heavy rain looking up at a dark stormy sky, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: From below, the same skylight showed a sunset that did not belong to my town.
scenes.image_prompt: a skylight glowing orange with an unfamiliar sunset, dark room interior beneath, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I climbed onto the roof to check the glass.
scenes.image_prompt: a person silhouette on a dim sloped rooftop beside a skylight at night, fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: From the roof the skylight was dark. Only from inside did it show another sky.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark skylight viewed from outside on a roof, no glow, dim night, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The skies it showed grew stranger. Two moons. A green dusk. Birds I did not know.
scenes.image_prompt: a skylight revealing an alien dusk with two pale moons, dark room below, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night a shape passed across that other sky and paused, looking down.
scenes.image_prompt: a skylight showing a dim sky with a vague dark silhouette overhead, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered it with plywood. The wood glows faintly at the edges now.
scenes.image_prompt: a plywood panel screwed over a ceiling skylight, thin light leaking at the seams, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Whatever sky is up there, something in it has started watching back.
scenes.image_prompt: a covered skylight at night with faint colored light bleeding around the boards, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
